reviews.review_description: I love it but we need more games and faster please I want to play the full game
You can play this game once or twice and it’ll be fun, but you want to get your moneys worth and have more levels? No, the game got abandoned and there’s no updates anymore, do NOT buy this game
Awesome game, plays wonderfully and looks amazing but we need another map or part 2
Impressive game, with some minor bugs, but very short and with little replay-value. Would be great if the developers added 3-5 more similar experiences.

reviews.review_title: Very amazing game but only has 1 map
reviews.review_description: I would love more maps this game would be incredible it’s very realistic and fun

reviews.review_title: Wish they had more maps, but otherwise g
reviews.review_description: Good game wish they had more maps

This game show how well dedication can carry out in the gaming community, the concept of this game is entertaining enough to keep me hooked and immersion is so crazy that it makes me feel as if my life is on the line, the only problem I have with this game, is that there isn’t many settings that I can change in order to move around easier in my small room
you get a single level with a hint of an "upcoming" level but no updates in years, dont buy. the single level you do get is cool but does not nearly justify the cost.

This game is fully impressive and gives you infinite chances.  You legitimately feel like you're thousands of feet in the air.  You get two pouches to hold tools, but they don't seem to be adjustable for height.  I'm not short and it was difficult for me to use them, but only just.

Ultimately, a very fun experience and would fully recommend.  I only issue is that it doesn't have many levels, the only other game is a demo for a sub.
I love games like this the only reason I didn’t give it 5 stars becease game was short but really really cool can’t wait to see what else they make
This game has so much potential but it needs updates
It’s been like 2 years where is it

Seems this game will never be completed 

Pity ...it had real promise 

If I am wrong Devs let us know

reviews.review_title: I want to like this game, too buggy
reviews.review_description: This game while good for $5, as it stands right now should be free, I get they want funding but constant bugs like necessity’s disappearing or oxygen mask straight up covers my whole face, there’s too many. On top of that I had to search up and watch a 20 minute video after trying for awhile to figure one part out because apparently you had to use a tool that the game said you did not need. I love the visuals, I play a lot of VR and this game is stunning and makes you shake while climbing the balloon but it’s just very unfinished. I get it’s early access but it seems like it’s too early to be released at all, my recommendation is to wait at least a few months before buying this game. Plenty of potential but as it stands right now too many game breaking bugs.
I saw your game on tiktok it lookt fun so i bougt it bet i could not Play it beacus i have a to small room so please fix this and do so i can use the joystick
This game is good I like the graphics and the gameplay, I'm sure they will have more updates in the future.
It’s overall super fun and anxiety inducing but I cannot to even save my life, get outside, that’s why I give it a 3 stars
It's a really fun game
Great game but needs more things to do other than that fun game do recommend
I loved the experience of reparing the hot air balloon and landing too safety!! I was wondering when new stuff will be added in?
